### Teaching Experience

**Pennsylvania State University**

| Term | Course / Role |
| --- | --- |
| Spring 2026 | Adult Development and Aging |
| Fall 2025 | No teaching, Course Buyout |
| Spring 2025 | Adult Development and Aging (Instructor of Record, co-teaching with A. Santos) |
| Fall 2024 | No teaching, Course Release |
| Spring 2024 | Adult Development and Aging; Individual Studies |
| Fall 2023 | Individual Studies |

**University of Central Florida**

| Term | Course / Role |
| --- | --- |
| Summer 2023 | Independent Study |
| Summer 2023 | Honors Directed Readings II |
| Summer 2023 | Directed Independent Research |
| Spring 2023 | Advanced Human--Computer Interaction |
| Spring 2023 | Directed Independent Research |
| Spring 2023 | Honors Thesis I and II |
| Spring 2023 | Independent Study |
| Fall 2022 | Cognitive Psychology |
| Fall 2022 | Honors Directed Readings I |
| Fall 2022 | Directed Independent Research |
| Fall 2022 | Honors Thesis I |
| Spring 2022 | Advanced Human--Computer Interaction |
| Spring 2022 | Honors Directed Readings |
| Spring 2022 | Directed Independent Research |
| Fall 2021 | Directed Independent Research |
| Fall 2021 | Cognitive Psychology |
| Spring 2021 | Cognitive Psychology |
| Fall 2021 | Cognitive Psychology |

**Florida State University**

| Term | Course / Role |
| --- | --- |
| Fall 2016 | Brain and behavior |
| Spring 2016 | Research Methods |
| Summer 2014 | Python Programming + Open-Source Experiment Building Workshop (Co-Lecturer) |

### Teaching Preparation and Training

| Item | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Completed Teaching Practicum | FSU Psychology Department Teaching Practicum, Department of Psychology (Supervisors: Dr. Orenda Johnson, Dr. Justin Moss). January 2016--May 2016. |
| Professional Training | ABCs of Diversity (December 2021); Essentials of Online Teaching (Fall 2020); FERPA Training (May 2020). |
